creator: noreply@mailinator.com
text:
In the article "FreeBSD Quickstart Guide for Linux® Users", Chapter 6, found at http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/linux-users/firewall.html or under /usr/share/doc

The word 'shaping' has an extra 'p' in the following sentence :

"IPFW can be paired with dummynet(4) to provide traffic shapping capabilities"

Fix: 

Remove either of the of 'p's.

-- IPFW can be paired with dummynet(4) to provide traffic shapping capabilities
++ IPFW can be paired with dummynet(4) to provide traffic shaping capabilities
How-To-Repeat: N/A
